title: lantana camara f. rosea
intro: Lantana camara f. rosea, also known as pink lantana, is a flowering shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of lantana camara f. rosea include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Lantana camara f. rosea can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
